prompt_inputs.goal: Cutting phase for upcoming bodybuilding competition - maximize fat loss while preserving lean muscle mass, targeting approximately 2000 calories per day with very high protein intake

solution_criteria: Presents a single day's meal plan with clearly defined meals (e.g., breakfast, lunch, dinner, snacks)
Total daily calories are roughly around 2000 kcal
Protein content is emphasized and high across meals (collectively totaling roughly 1.5-2g per kg of bodyweight)
Plan contains no dairy or added sugar ingredients
Output is compact and concise rather than overly long or verbose
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Competitive bodybuilder in cutting phase requiring high-protein, low-calorie meal plan

prompt_inputs.goal: High-carb fueling plan for a long marathon training day (20 miles)

solution_criteria: Plan is for a single day and includes distinct meals/snacks (breakfast, pre-run, during-run, post-run, dinner)
Carbohydrate-heavy food choices are emphasized throughout, appropriate for endurance fueling
No dairy/lactose-containing foods are included, or lactose-free alternatives are used
Output is compact and concise, not overly long-winded
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Endurance marathon runner needing high-carb fueling plan for a long training day

prompt_inputs.goal: Support high training volume and recovery for competitive swimming while maintaining lean muscle mass

solution_criteria: Provides a full day meal plan (breakfast, lunch, dinner, and at least one snack) suitable for a high-calorie athlete
All meals and snacks are free of lactose-containing ingredients, or clearly use lactose-free substitutes
Overall plan reflects high caloric and carbohydrate needs appropriate for a teenage athlete in intense training
Plan is concise and compact, not overly long or verbose
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Teenage swimmer with high caloric needs and lactose intolerance restriction

prompt_inputs.goal: Build lean muscle and improve CrossFit performance while staying fully plant-based
prompt_inputs.restrictions: Vegan (no animal products); no soy due to mild intolerance

solution_criteria: Plan covers exactly one day and stays concise (not overly verbose)
All meals/snacks are fully vegan and contain no soy-based ingredients
Includes an estimate of total daily protein intake that is adequate for an 82kg athlete building muscle (roughly 130-165g)
Meals clearly draw from varied plant protein sources (e.g., legumes, grains, nuts/seeds) to ensure balanced amino acid intake
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Vegan CrossFit athlete needing balanced macros without animal products

prompt_inputs.goal: Optimize energy levels and recovery for match day performance without gastrointestinal discomfort

solution_criteria: Provides a full day meal plan (breakfast, lunch, pre-match snack, dinner) suitable for match day timing
All meals and snacks are free of gluten-containing ingredients
Meal plan reflects sports nutrition principles appropriate for a professional athlete (adequate carbohydrates for energy, moderate protein, easily digestible pre-match choices)
Output is compact and concise, not exceeding a single day's plan
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Professional soccer player with gluten sensitivity preparing for match day

prompt_inputs.goal: Make weight and perform optimally at a powerlifting competition while staying in ketosis
prompt_inputs.restrictions: Ketogenic diet (very low carb, high fat, moderate protein); no gluten

solution_criteria: Provides a full day meal plan with clearly separated meals appropriate for competition day timing (e.g., pre-competition, between attempts, post-competition)
All meals are consistent with ketogenic macronutrient ratios (low carb, high fat, moderate protein) and avoid gluten-containing ingredients
Plan is compact and concise, listing foods/portions without excessive detail or unnecessary commentary
Content is practical for a powerlifter of the given height and weight, supporting energy and performance needs on competition day
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Powerlifter following a ketogenic diet for a competition day meal plan

prompt_inputs.goal: Maintain energy and support recovery for multiple daily training sessions while promoting healthy growth
prompt_inputs.restrictions: Severe tree nut and peanut allergy; needs small frequent meals due to short training breaks

solution_criteria: Plan contains no nuts, peanuts, or nut-derived ingredients (e.g., no almond/peanut butter, nut oils)
Structured as multiple small meals/snacks (at least 5 eating occasions) rather than 3 large meals
Each meal/snack emphasizes nutrient-dense whole foods (protein, complex carbs, fruits/vegetables) suitable for a growing youth athlete
Plan is concise and fits within a single day format without excessive detail or calorie calculations
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Youth gymnast with nut allergy needing nutrient-dense small frequent meals

prompt_inputs.goal: Fuel and recover properly for a 5-hour endurance training ride starting at 7am, maximizing glycogen availability and recovery

solution_criteria: Provides a full 1-day meal plan that is compact and concise, not overly long
Includes specific meal/snack timing relative to the 5-hour ride (before, during, and after)
Nutrition choices are appropriate for endurance cycling (e.g., carbohydrate-focused pre/during-ride, protein+carb recovery post-ride)
Avoids lactose-containing ingredients throughout the plan
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Elite cyclist requiring meal timing plan around a 5-hour training ride

prompt_inputs.goal: Fuel for half-Ironman training on a tight grocery budget while maintaining lean muscle

solution_criteria: Provides a full 1-day meal plan (breakfast, lunch, dinner, and snacks) suitable for a triathlete's training demands
Uses affordable, budget-friendly ingredients throughout, avoiding expensive specialty items
Excludes all dairy/lactose and shellfish ingredients per restrictions
Plan is compact and concise, not exceeding roughly 400 tokens
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Triathlete on a tight budget needing an affordable yet performance-optimized plan

prompt_inputs.goal: Increase dietary iron intake to address diagnosed iron deficiency while maintaining energy for competitive tennis training

solution_criteria: Provides a full 1-day meal plan (breakfast, lunch, dinner, and at least one snack)
Includes iron-rich foods in multiple meals, with plant-based (non-heme) or lactose-free heme iron sources appropriate for an athlete
Avoids lactose-containing dairy items or notes lactose-free alternatives
Plan is concise and compact, not exceeding roughly 400 tokens of output
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Female tennis player managing iron deficiency needing iron-rich meal plan
